info.title: dotnet-coalesce
info.description:
.NET global/local tool for Coalesce code generation. For the `DotNetCliToolReference`-style
      tool, see https://www.nuget.org/packages/IntelliTect.Coalesce.Tools.

      Learn more at https://coalesce.intellitect.com/

options.name: --debug
options.description: Wait for a debugger to be attached before starting generation

options.name: --what-if
options.description: Do not write output files to disk.

options.name: --verify
options.description: Verify that no output changes have been made. Use in CI builds to ensure that codegen has not been forgotten.

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Output verbosity. Options are Trace, Debug, Information, Warning, Error, Critical, None.

arguments.name: config
arguments.description: Path to a coalesce.json configuration file that will drive generation.  If not specified, it will search in current folder.
